system.description: When you consult your accumulated knowledge, roll +INT: on a 10+, The GM will tell you something interesting and useful about the topic at hand; On a 7-9, the GM will tell you something interesting—it's on you to make it useful;either way, the GM might ask “how do you know this?”

success.description: The GM will tell you something interesting and useful about the topic at hand.

partial.description: the GM will tell you something interesting—it's on you to make it useful.

failure.description: Your maneuver fails and you suffer your enemy's attack. (Up to GM interpretation)
